Section Title: Edelweiss Mutual Fund announces limit on subscriptions to its 7 international funds
Content:
SECTIONS
Edelweiss Mutual Fund announces limit on subscriptions to its 7 international funds
By
Surbhi Khanna
, ET Online Last Updated: Oct 14, 2025, 05:08:00 PM IST
Rate Story
[](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=economictimes)
[Follow us](https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb6dOI1EKyZPPqpH7I0y)
Share
Font Size
Abc Small
Abc Medium
Abc Large
Save
Print
Comment
Synopsis
Edelweiss Mutual Fund will restrict new lump sum and switch-in investments in seven of its international schemes from October 16, capping SIPs and STPs at ₹5,000 per PAN per day due to nearing overseas investment limits set by SEBI.
Getty Images Edelweiss MF limits fresh investments and SIPs in seven international funds as overseas allocation nears SEBI threshold.
Section Title: Edelweiss Mutual Fund announces limit on subscriptions to its 7 international funds
Content:
[Edelweiss Mutual Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/edelweiss-mutual-fund/mutual_funds_search/amcid-339.cms) has announced to limit subscription on its seven international funds with effect from October 16. The fund house has decided to discontinue the new lumpsum investment, switch-ins in the following schemes of Edelweiss Mutual Fund.
The new systematic transactions viz., monthly Systematic Investment Plan (SIP) and monthly Systematic Transfer Plan (STPs) will be capped at maximum INR 5,000 per PAN per day with effect from the Effective date. This restriction will be applicable based on the transaction reporting date. Further, transactions reported till October 15, 2025 before cut-off time including switches where switch-in scheme is any of the below will not be considered for such limit restriction. The existing systematic transactions viz. SIPs/ STPs etc. will remain unaffected.
Section Title: Edelweiss Mutual Fund announces limit on subscriptions to its 7 international funds
Content:
Also Read | [Mutual funds increase cash allocation by Rs 1,139 crore to nearly Rs 2 lakh crore in September](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/mf/analysis/mutual-funds-increase-cash-allocation-by-rs-1139-crore-to-nearly-rs-2-lakh-crore-in-september/articleshow/124548733.cms)
[Best MF to invest Looking for the best mutual funds to invest? Here are our recommendations. View **Details** »](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/mf/best-mutual-funds-to-invest)
The seven funds are - Edelweiss ASEAN Equity Off-shore Fund , Edelweiss Greater China Equity Off-shore Fund , Edelweiss US Technology Equity Fund of Fund , Edelweiss Emerging Markets Opportunities Equity Offshore Fund, Edelweiss Europe Dynamic Equity Offshore Fund, Edelweiss US Value Equity Off-shore Fund, and Edelweiss MSCI India Domestic & World Healthcare 45 Index Fund.

Section Title: Edelweiss Mutual Fund limits subscription in its 7 international funds
Content:
SECTIONS
Edelweiss Mutual Fund limits subscription in its 7 international funds
By
Surbhi Khanna
, ET Online Last Updated: Aug 14, 2025, 12:55:00 PM IST
Rate Story
[Follow us](https://www.whatsapp.com/channel/0029Va54SU83rZZYg2XcdM0K)
Share
Font Size
Abc Small
Abc Medium
Abc Large
Save
Print
Comment
Synopsis
Edelweiss Mutual Fund will restrict subscriptions in seven international schemes to Rs 1 lakh per PAN per day from August 19, citing limited overseas investment headroom. The cap applies to lumpsum, switch-ins, SIPs, and STPs, while existing systematic transactions remain unaffected.
IANS The fund house said that investors vide notice cum addendum dated April 09, 2025 and July 28, 2025 were informed about the increase in the limit of subscriptions.
Section Title: Edelweiss Mutual Fund limits subscription in its 7 international funds
Content:
[Edelweiss Mutual Fund](https://economictimes.indiatimes.com/edelweiss-mutual-fund/mutual_funds_search/amcid-339.cms) will cap subscriptions, including lumpsum, switch-ins, SIPs, and STPs, at Rs 1 lakh per PAN per day for its seven international schemes, effective August 19, the fund house said in a notice-cum-addendum.
“This restriction will be applicable based on the transaction reporting date. Further, transactions reported till August 18, 2025 before cut-off time including switches where switch-in scheme is any of the below will not be considered for such limit restriction. The existing systematic transactions viz. SIPs/ STPs etc. will remain unaffected,” the notice read.
Section Title: Edelweiss Mutual Fund limits subscription in its 7 international funds
Content:
The affected schemes are: Edelweiss ASEAN Equity Off-shore Fund, Edelweiss Greater China Equity Off-shore Fund , Edelweiss US Technology Equity Fund of Fund, Edelweiss Emerging Markets Opportunities Equity Offshore Fund, Edelweiss Europe Dynamic Equity Offshore Fund, Edelweiss US Value Equity Off-shore Fund, and Edelweiss MSCI India Domestic & World Healthcare 45 Index Fund.

Section Title: ... > ### About Edelweiss Emerging Markets Opportunities Equity Offshore Fund Direct Growth
Content:
Edelweiss Emerging Markets Opportunities Equity Offshore Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Edelweiss Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 30 Apr 2008. Bhavesh Jain is the Current Fund Manager of Edelweiss Emerging Markets Opportunities Equity Offshore Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹1,70,941 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 31 Mar 2026 is ₹25.18.
The Edelweiss Emerging Markets Opportunities Equity Offshore Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 90 days.
;
Section Title: ... > Investment Objective
Content:
The scheme seeks to provide long term capital growth by investing predominantly in the JPMorgan Funds - Emerging Markets Opportunities Fund, an equity fund which invests primarily in an aggressively managed portfolio of emerging market companies.
Fund benchmark MSCI Emerging Markets Total Return Index
